version.description: The semantic version of the OS update (e.g. 1.1.0)

iso_url.description: Direct download URL for the update bundle/ISO

sha256_hash.description: SHA-256 checksum of the downloaded file for integrity verification

urgency.description: Determines if the update can be delayed or must be forced

changelog.description: List of user-facing changes to display in the GTK UI before installing
